texto: I think the most fun part about working on 'Good Luck Charlie' is spending time with everyone, honestly, because everybody on set is like my brother and sister and mom and dad. They're so fun to be around, so that's probably the best part about working there.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bradley Steven Perry: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I think the most fun part about working on 'Good Luck Charlie' is spending time with everyone, ho…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, time, sister pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e trabalho.
